message:
test(workflows): add device code parsing and validation tests

Comprehensive test coverage for the device authentication flow:

- parse_device_code: Direct format, v2 format, lowercase prompts,
  missing code error, empty input, URL-only (no code), mixed case
  normalization
- validate_device_code: Valid formats (alphanumeric-dash), invalid
  formats (empty, no dash, trailing/leading dash, multiple dashes)
- Device auth constants and error display safety (no sensitive data
  leakage in error messages)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
